lane.execution: Yellow or Red depending on TikTok Ads Manager URL change scope

purpose: Make TikTok campaign/day spend joinable to GA4 paid_tiktok session quality by carrying campaign_id as an exact URL parameter.

source_window_freshness_confidence.window: TikTok export 2026-05-07 to 2026-05-12, GA4 latest through 2026-05-12

current_problem.reason: GA4 BigQuery currently has campaign hints such as tiktok_biocom_yeonddle_iggacidset but not TikTok campaign_id exact.

success_criteria: GA4 BigQuery shows tt_campaign_id or utm_id for active TikTok paid sessions
Exact campaign id coverage is at least 95% after 7 days for active spend campaigns
Semantic join and exact join are reported separately
TikTok Ads Manager spend/click joins to GA4 sessions/scroll/checkout/purchase by campaign_id and date
stop_criteria: utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign become the same value
Exact campaign id coverage remains below 50% after 7 days

recommendation.reason: The rule addresses the current campaign/day exact join gap, but actual URL changes must be controlled and verified over 24h/72h/7d.
